audit_items.proof_trace: ccm.h contains only three inline accessor functions (nfp_ccm_get_type, __nfp_ccm_get_tag, nfp_ccm_get_tag) plus struct/enum declarations; none perform any dynamic memory allocation (no kmalloc, alloc_skb, etc.). The struct nfp_ccm fields (tag_allocator bitmap, sk_buff_head, wait_queue_head_t) are embedded in the struct, not heap-allocated. The property assertion is vacuously satisfied — the universal quantifier over zero allocations is trivially true.
